domain_hint: single-stage axial compressor CFD (rotor-stator, SST k-omega, ANSYS CFX) for blade geometry design ranking
ambiguity_notes: Inconsistency A: frame-change method (mixing-plane vs frozen-rotor) stated differently in slides vs run logs, affecting which efficiency value is valid. Inconsistency B: mesh level used for production runs contradicted between slide deck and companion technical note TN-CFD-2024-11. Inconsistency C: validation scope overstated in abstract vs. accurately bounded in body of same document. Inconsistency D: inlet distortion boundary condition stated as uniform in Slide 3 but as a 4% circumferential profile in the technical note BC table — directly affects stall margin prediction credibility.
